architectural_principles: Individual branding per portal and per user

core.description: Unified authentication and permission management. Portal-specific login pages.

admin.description: SuperAdmin system portal for user and credential management.

maintenance.description: Work Orders, Preventive Maintenance, Spare Parts.

stores_purchase.description: Inventory, Re-order management, Multi-level procurement approvals.

transport.description: Live tracking (OSM), Route optimization, Driver logs, Fleet maintenance.

production.description: Batch tracking, QC Checkpoints, Process monitoring.

requirements_summary.authentication: Unified identity, portal-based permissions, unique login designs per portal.
requirements_summary.branding: Dynamic themes per user, optional persistence, unique color schemes per portal.
requirements_summary.integration: All data linked for global dashboards and cross-departmental indents.
requirements_summary.licensing: Strictly 100% free and open-source libraries and tools.

last_action: Established plan for system-wide expansion and migrated to PostgreSQL schema design.
